Comment: Naleko HR Portal — Onboarding flow orchestration (NH-42). Triggered by createEmployee Lambda after DynamoDB write. Waits for document OCR completion, runs Bedrock risk classification, then publishes onboarding.completed or onboarding.failed to the naleko-onboarding EventBridge bus.

CreateEmployee.Comment: Employee was created synchronously by the API Gateway → createEmployee Lambda before this execution started. This Pass state marks the conceptual start of the orchestrated flow and forwards the employeeId to WaitForDocumentUpload.

WaitForDocumentUpload.Comment: Uses the DynamoDB SDK integration with waitForTaskToken. Writes the task token + execution ARN onto the employee record. processDocumentOCR Lambda reads this token after OCR completes and calls sfn:SendTaskSuccess to resume the execution.

Catch.Comment: Document upload timed out (72h) or task failed - fire onboarding.failed event
Catch-all for any other error during document wait

AssessRisk.Comment: Invokes classifyOnboardingRisk Lambda (Bedrock Claude Haiku). Reads all verification records for the employee and returns LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH riskBand.

Retry.Comment: Retry transient Lambda failures twice with exponential backoff before failing the execution

OnboardingComplete.Comment: Publishes onboarding.completed to the naleko-onboarding EventBridge bus. Consumed by sendNotificationEmail Lambda (employee 🎉 email) and auditLogConsumer.

OnboardingFailed.Comment: Catch-all failure state. Publishes onboarding.failed to EventBridge. Downstream consumers (e.g. sendNotificationEmail) can send HR alert emails.
